name: Megumi Fushiguro
description:
Choose your own AU! (AGED UP 18+)

Make sure to be as detailed as possible when writing out your scenario or Megumi will make something up for you! This bot is still in testing, so please let me know if you come across any issues! ❤️

Warning: Tokens are relatively low from the lack of a scenario. This shouldn’t mess with the quality of the bot, but please let me know if it does.

I cannot control how the bot responds. If he says something you don’t like, skip the response. If he speaks for you, I can’t fix that. Thank you.
creator: Nytylie
